### TC-1071: Successful AI chat response for valid question

**Type:** e2e
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-121
**Requirement:** WA-AI-001

**Description:** Verify that a logged-in user receives an AI-generated response within acceptable time for a valid query

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- AI assistant service is available
- AI chat feature is enabled

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Open the AI chat interface from the application | AI chat window is displayed and ready for input |
| 2 | 2. Enter a valid question (e.g., 'How do I reset my password?') | Question text appears in the input field |
| 3 | 3. Submit the question | Request is sent and a loading indicator is shown |
| 4 | 4. Wait for the response | AI-generated response is displayed within acceptable time threshold |

**Final Expected Result:** User receives an AI-generated response within acceptable time for a valid question

---

### TC-1072: Empty query validation

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-121
**Requirement:** WA-AI-001

**Description:** Verify the system prevents empty submissions and prompts user to enter a valid question

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- AI chat interface is open

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Ensure the input field is empty | Input field is empty |
| 2 | 2. Click the submit/send button | No request is sent and a validation prompt is displayed |

**Final Expected Result:** System prompts the user to enter a valid question and does not send a request

---

### TC-1073: Unsupported query validation

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-121
**Requirement:** WA-AI-001

**Description:** Verify the system prompts user for unsupported queries without sending a request

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- AI chat interface is open

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Enter an unsupported query (e.g., disallowed content or invalid format defined by the system) | Unsupported query text appears in the input field |
| 2 | 2. Submit the query | System displays a validation prompt indicating the query is unsupported and no request is sent |

**Final Expected Result:** User is prompted to enter a valid question; no AI request is sent

---

### TC-1074: AI service unavailable error handling

**Type:** integration
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-121
**Requirement:** WA-AI-001

**Description:** Verify the system shows an error and allows retry when the AI service is unavailable

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- AI chat interface is open
- AI service is unavailable (simulate 503 or network error)

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Enter a valid question | Question text appears in the input field |
| 2 | 2. Submit the question | Request is attempted and an error message is displayed |
| 3 | 3. Click the retry option | System attempts to resend the request |

**Final Expected Result:** Error is displayed for unavailable service and user can retry the request

---

### TC-1075: AI service timeout handling

**Type:** integration
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-121
**Requirement:** WA-AI-001

**Description:** Verify the system handles AI service timeout with an error message and retry option

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- AI chat interface is open
- AI service is configured to time out

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Enter a valid question | Question text appears in the input field |
| 2 | 2. Submit the question | Loading indicator appears while waiting for response |
| 3 | 3. Wait for timeout threshold to be reached | System displays a timeout error message with retry option |

**Final Expected Result:** Timeout error is shown and user is allowed to retry

---

### TC-1076: Response time performance within acceptable threshold

**Type:** performance
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-121
**Requirement:** WA-AI-001

**Description:** Ensure AI response time meets acceptable performance requirements

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- AI assistant service is available
- AI chat interface is open
- Performance threshold is defined

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Submit a valid question | Request is sent and a loading indicator is displayed |
| 2 | 2. Measure time to first response | Response is received within the defined acceptable time threshold |

**Final Expected Result:** AI response time meets performance requirements

---

### TC-1077: Boundary condition: very long question input

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-121
**Requirement:** WA-AI-001

**Description:** Verify system behavior for maximum allowed input length

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- AI chat interface is open
- Maximum input length is defined

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Enter a question at the maximum allowed length | Input is accepted without truncation or error |
| 2 | 2. Submit the question | Request is sent and processed |
| 3 | 3. Wait for response | AI-generated response is displayed |

**Final Expected Result:** System accepts and processes maximum length input correctly

---

### TC-1078: Boundary condition: input exceeds maximum length

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-121
**Requirement:** WA-AI-001

**Description:** Verify system prevents or handles input exceeding the maximum length

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- AI chat interface is open
- Maximum input length is defined

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Paste a question that exceeds the maximum allowed length | System prevents additional input or shows a validation message |
| 2 | 2. Attempt to submit the over-length question | System blocks submission and prompts user to reduce input length |

**Final Expected Result:** System enforces maximum input length and prevents invalid submission

---

### TC-1079: Retry after service recovery

**Type:** integration
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-121
**Requirement:** WA-AI-001

**Description:** Verify successful response after retry when AI service becomes available

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- AI chat interface is open
- AI service is initially unavailable and then recovers

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Submit a valid question while service is unavailable | Error message is displayed with retry option |
| 2 | 2. Restore AI service availability | Service status is healthy |
| 3 | 3. Click retry | Request is resent and a response is returned |

**Final Expected Result:** After service recovery, retry succeeds and AI response is displayed

---

### TC-108: Error handling on network loss during send

**Type:** integration
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-012
**Requirement:** WA-MSG-002

**Description:** Verify message is not sent and error displayed if network drops during send

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- User is in an active chat with at least one participant
- Microphone permission is granted
- Network connection is available initially

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Start recording a voice message | Recording starts and UI indicator is visible |
| 2 | 2. Turn off network connection before tapping send | Network becomes unavailable |
| 3 | 3. Tap send | Error is shown and send fails |
| 4 | 4. Check the chat message list | Voice message is not delivered |

**Final Expected Result:** System shows an error and does not send the message when network drops

---

### TC-1080: Show smart reply suggestions for incoming message

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-122
**Requirement:** WA-AI-002

**Description:** Verify that relevant smart reply suggestions are displayed when opening the reply composer for a message with sufficient context.

**Preconditions:**
- Agent is logged in
- Incoming customer message with sufficient context is displayed in the conversation

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Open the incoming message thread | The message thread is visible with the incoming customer message displayed |
| 2 | 2. Click/open the reply composer | Reply composer opens and a list of smart reply suggestions is shown |

**Final Expected Result:** Relevant smart reply suggestions are displayed in the reply composer for the incoming message

---

### TC-1081: Insert selected smart reply into composer

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-122
**Requirement:** WA-AI-002

**Description:** Verify that selecting a smart reply inserts its text into the reply composer for editing.

- Agent is logged in
- Incoming customer message with sufficient context is displayed
- Smart reply suggestions are visible in the reply composer

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Click one smart reply suggestion from the list | The selected smart reply text is inserted into the reply composer |

**Final Expected Result:** Selected smart reply is inserted into the reply composer and is editable

---

### TC-1082: No suggestions when insufficient context

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-122
**Requirement:** WA-AI-002

**Description:** Verify the system shows no suggestions and indicates none are available when context is insufficient.

**Preconditions:**
- Agent is logged in
- Incoming customer message with insufficient context is displayed

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Open the reply composer | Reply composer opens and no smart reply suggestions are shown |
| 2 | 2. Check the suggestions area/indicator | A message/indicator states that no suggestions are available |

**Final Expected Result:** No suggestions are displayed and a clear indicator communicates none are available

---

### TC-1083: Suggestions list relevance to message content

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-122
**Requirement:** WA-AI-002

**Description:** Verify that suggestions are relevant to the incoming message content.

**Preconditions:**
- Agent is logged in
- Incoming message about order status is displayed

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Open the reply composer | Suggestions list appears |
| 2 | 2. Review suggestion content | Suggestions reference order status or related topics |

**Final Expected Result:** Displayed suggestions align with the topic of the incoming message

### TC-1084: Selecting multiple suggestions sequentially

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-122
**Requirement:** WA-AI-002

**Description:** Verify behavior when agent selects multiple suggestions one after another.

**Preconditions:**
- Agent is logged in
- Incoming customer message with sufficient context is displayed
- Smart reply suggestions are visible

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Select the first smart reply suggestion | First suggestion text is inserted into the reply composer |
| 2 | 2. Select a second smart reply suggestion | Second suggestion text is inserted according to system behavior (appended or replaced) |

**Final Expected Result:** Reply composer updates predictably based on defined behavior for multiple selections

---

### TC-1085: Editing inserted smart reply text

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-122
**Requirement:** WA-AI-002

**Description:** Verify that inserted smart reply text can be edited by the agent.

- Incoming message with sufficient context is displayed
- A smart reply has been inserted into the reply composer

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|

### TC-1086: Boundary: Very short incoming message

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-122
**Requirement:** WA-AI-002

**Description:** Verify suggestions behavior for a very short incoming message at the boundary of sufficient context.

- Agent is logged in
- Incoming customer message contains a very short text (e.g., 1-2 words)

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Open the reply composer | Reply composer opens |
| 2 | 2. Observe suggestions area | Either relevant suggestions are shown or a 'none available' indicator is displayed based on context evaluation |

**Final Expected Result:** System handles boundary-length messages consistently by showing relevant suggestions or indicating none available

### TC-1087: Negative: Suggestions not shown without opening composer

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** low
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-122
**Requirement:** WA-AI-002

**Description:** Verify that smart replies are not displayed when the reply composer is not opened.

**Preconditions:**
- Agent is logged in
- Incoming customer message with sufficient context is displayed

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. View the incoming message thread without opening the reply composer | Smart reply suggestions are not displayed |

**Final Expected Result:** Suggestions appear only after the reply composer is opened

### TC-1088: Integration: Smart reply service returns suggestions

**Type:** integration
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-122
**Requirement:** WA-AI-002

**Description:** Verify integration between UI and smart reply service for suggestions retrieval.

- Agent is logged in
- Incoming customer message with sufficient context is displayed
- Smart reply service is available

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Open the reply composer | UI sends request to smart reply service |
| 2 | 2. Receive suggestions response | Suggestions are rendered in the UI |

**Final Expected Result:** Suggestions retrieved from the service are displayed correctly in the composer

### TC-1089: Integration: Smart reply service returns no suggestions

**Type:** integration
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-122
**Requirement:** WA-AI-002

**Description:** Verify system behavior when service returns empty suggestions for insufficient context.

- Agent is logged in
- Incoming customer message with insufficient context is displayed
- Smart reply service is available

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Open the reply composer | UI sends request to smart reply service |
| 2 | 2. Receive empty suggestions response | No suggestions are displayed and a 'none available' indicator is shown |

**Final Expected Result:** Empty suggestions are handled gracefully with proper UI indication

### TC-109: Delete a selected message from inbox

**Type:** e2e
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-013
**Requirement:** WA-MSG-003

**Description:** Verify that a logged-in user can delete a selected message and it is removed from the inbox

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- Inbox contains at least one message

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Navigate to the inbox | Inbox is displayed with a list of messages |
| 2 | 2. Select a message from the list | Selected message is highlighted or marked as selected |
| 3 | 3. Click the delete option | A delete action is triggered for the selected message |
| 4 | 4. Refresh or revisit the inbox list | The deleted message is no longer displayed |

**Final Expected Result:** The selected message is removed from the inbox

### TC-1090: Performance: Suggestions load within acceptable time

**Type:** performance
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-122
**Requirement:** WA-AI-002

**Description:** Verify that suggestions are displayed within an acceptable response time.

**Preconditions:**
- Agent is logged in
- Incoming customer message with sufficient context is displayed
- Smart reply service is available

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Open the reply composer and start a timer | Request is sent to retrieve suggestions |
| 2 | 2. Stop timer when suggestions appear | Suggestions appear within the defined SLA (e.g., <= 2 seconds) |

**Final Expected Result:** Smart reply suggestions load within the acceptable performance threshold

### TC-1091: E2E: Agent uses smart reply to respond

**Type:** e2e
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-122
**Requirement:** WA-AI-002

**Description:** Verify the end-to-end flow of using a smart reply suggestion and sending a response.

**Preconditions:**
- Agent is logged in
- Incoming customer message with sufficient context is displayed
- Smart reply suggestions are available

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Open the reply composer | Suggestions are displayed |
| 2 | 2. Select a smart reply suggestion | Suggestion text is inserted into the reply composer |
| 3 | 3. Optionally edit the text | Edits are reflected in the composer |
| 4 | 4. Send the reply | Reply is sent and appears in the conversation thread |

**Final Expected Result:** Agent can successfully use a smart reply to send a response end-to-end

### TC-1092: Display relevant sticker suggestions for clear context

**Type:** e2e
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-123
**Requirement:** WA-AI-003

**Description:** Verify ranked sticker suggestions appear for clear contextual input

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- User is in an active chat
- Sticker suggestion service is available
- Suggestion panel auto-trigger is enabled

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Type a message with clear context (e.g., 'Happy birthday!') in the chat input | Message input shows the typed text |
| 2 | 2. Wait for auto-trigger or open the sticker suggestion panel | Suggestion panel opens |
| 3 | 3. Observe the sticker suggestions list | A ranked list of birthday-related stickers is displayed |

**Final Expected Result:** Relevant, ranked sticker suggestions matching the message context are shown

---

### TC-1093: Manual open of suggestion panel shows relevant suggestions

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-123
**Requirement:** WA-AI-003

**Description:** Ensure manual opening of suggestions uses the current message context

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- User is in an active chat
- Sticker suggestion service is available
- Suggestion panel auto-trigger is disabled

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Type a message with clear context (e.g., 'Congrats on your new job!') | Message input shows the typed text |
| 2 | 2. Tap the sticker suggestions icon to open the panel | Suggestion panel opens |
| 3 | 3. Review the stickers in the panel | Job/congratulations-related stickers appear at the top of the list |

**Final Expected Result:** Suggestions are context-based even when opened manually

---

### TC-1094: Ambiguous context returns generic/trending stickers

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-123
**Requirement:** WA-AI-003

**Description:** Verify ambiguous input results in generic or trending suggestions

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- User is in an active chat
- Sticker suggestion service is available

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Type ambiguous text (e.g., 'ok') | Message input shows the typed text |
| 2 | 2. Open the sticker suggestion panel | Suggestion panel opens |
| 3 | 3. Check the suggested stickers | Generic or trending stickers are displayed instead of no results |

**Final Expected Result:** The panel shows generic/trending stickers for ambiguous context

---

### TC-1095: No clear context returns generic/trending stickers

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-123
**Requirement:** WA-AI-003

**Description:** Verify no clear context still shows generic/trending suggestions

- User is logged in
- User is in an active chat
- Sticker suggestion service is available

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Type random characters (e.g., 'asdfgh') | Message input shows the typed text |
| 2 | 2. Open the sticker suggestion panel | Suggestion panel opens |
| 3 | 3. Review the suggestions | Generic or trending stickers are displayed |

**Final Expected Result:** The system does not show an empty list for unclear context

### TC-1096: Service unavailable shows non-blocking error and allows manual browsing

**Type:** integration
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-123
**Requirement:** WA-AI-003

**Description:** Ensure graceful handling when suggestion service is down

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- User is in an active chat
- Sticker suggestion service is unavailable or returns 5xx

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Type a message with clear context | Message input shows the typed text |
| 2 | 2. Open the sticker suggestion panel | A non-blocking error message is displayed |
| 3 | 3. Attempt to browse stickers manually | Manual sticker browsing is accessible and functional |

**Final Expected Result:** User receives a non-blocking error and can still browse stickers manually

---

### TC-1097: Empty input does not trigger context suggestions

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** low
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-123
**Requirement:** WA-AI-003

**Description:** Verify boundary condition with empty message input

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- User is in an active chat
- Sticker suggestion service is available

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Ensure the message input is empty | Message input shows no text |
| 2 | 2. Open the sticker suggestion panel | Suggestion panel opens |
| 3 | 3. Observe the suggestions list | Generic/trending stickers are shown |

**Final Expected Result:** Generic/trending suggestions are shown without contextual ranking

### TC-1098: Ranking order reflects relevance for strong context

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-123
**Requirement:** WA-AI-003

**Description:** Validate that suggestions are ranked by relevance

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- User is in an active chat
- Sticker suggestion service is available

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Type a strong context message (e.g., 'I'm so sad today') | Message input shows the typed text |
| 2 | 2. Open the sticker suggestion panel | Suggestion panel opens |
| 3 | 3. Inspect the top 3 suggestions | Sad/comfort-related stickers appear at the top |

**Final Expected Result:** The list is ranked with most relevant stickers first

---

### TC-1099: Performance: Suggestions appear within acceptable time

**Type:** performance
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-123
**Requirement:** WA-AI-003

**Description:** Ensure suggestions load quickly after trigger

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- User is in an active chat
- Sticker suggestion service is available
- Network latency is within normal range

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Type a clear context message (e.g., 'LOL that was funny') | Message input shows the typed text |
| 2 | 2. Open the suggestion panel and start timing | Suggestion panel opens and loading indicator (if any) appears |
| 3 | 3. Stop timing when suggestions render | Suggestions are displayed within 1 second |

**Final Expected Result:** Sticker suggestions render within the defined performance threshold

---

### TC-110: Attempt to delete without selecting a message

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-013
**Requirement:** WA-MSG-003

**Description:** Verify the system prevents deletion when no message is selected

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- Inbox contains at least one message

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Navigate to the inbox | Inbox is displayed with a list of messages |
| 2 | 2. Ensure no message is selected | No message is highlighted or marked as selected |
| 3 | 3. Click the delete option | System prevents deletion and prompts user to select a message |

**Final Expected Result:** Deletion is blocked and a prompt to select a message is shown

---

### TC-1100: Network timeout returns non-blocking error

**Type:** integration
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-123
**Requirement:** WA-AI-003

**Description:** Verify handling of request timeouts as a negative scenario

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- User is in an active chat
- Sticker suggestion service request times out

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Type a clear context message | Message input shows the typed text |
| 2 | 2. Open the sticker suggestion panel | A non-blocking error message is displayed after timeout |
| 3 | 3. Open manual sticker browser | Manual sticker browsing is available |

**Final Expected Result:** Timeout is handled gracefully and manual browsing is still available

---

### TC-1101: Context change updates suggestions

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-123
**Requirement:** WA-AI-003

**Description:** Ensure suggestions update when message context changes

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- User is in an active chat
- Sticker suggestion service is available

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Type a message with clear context (e.g., 'Happy birthday!') | Message input shows the typed text |
| 2 | 2. Open the suggestion panel and note the top suggestion category | Birthday-related stickers appear |
| 3 | 3. Replace the text with a different context (e.g., 'Get well soon') | Message input shows the new text |
| 4 | 4. Refresh or reopen the suggestion panel | Get-well-related stickers appear at the top |

**Final Expected Result:** Suggestions are updated based on the latest message context

---

### TC-1102: RTL layout rendering for text, navigation, and form fields

**Type:** e2e
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-124
**Requirement:** WA-LOC-001

**Description:** Verify full RTL layout, alignment, and text direction on a standard page

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- Application language is set to an RTL language (e.g., Arabic)

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Open a page containing text blocks, top navigation, and a form section | Page loads without errors |
| 2 | 2. Observe overall page layout and alignment | Layout is mirrored RTL (primary content aligned to right, navigation aligned to right) |
| 3 | 3. Inspect text direction in headings and paragraphs | Text direction is right-to-left and alignment is right |
| 4 | 4. Inspect form labels and input fields alignment | Labels and input fields are right-aligned and flow RTL |

**Final Expected Result:** All page content, navigation, and form elements are rendered fully RTL

---

### TC-1103: RTL navigation order in menus and lists

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-124
**Requirement:** WA-LOC-001

**Description:** Verify RTL ordering in menus, lists, and pagination controls

**Preconditions:**
- RTL language is active
- Menu and list data are available

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Open a page with a horizontal top menu and a list with pagination | Menu and list are visible |
| 2 | 2. Observe the order of menu items | Menu items are ordered right-to-left |
| 3 | 3. Observe list bullet alignment and item order | List items align right and follow RTL order |
| 4 | 4. Observe pagination control placement and order | Pagination controls are mirrored (Next is on the left, Previous on the right, if applicable) |

**Final Expected Result:** Menus, lists, and pagination follow RTL ordering and placement

---

### TC-1104: RTL form input alignment, cursor behavior, and placeholders

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-124
**Requirement:** WA-LOC-001

**Description:** Verify RTL-specific input alignment, cursor position, and placeholder direction

**Preconditions:**
- RTL language is active
- User is on a form page with text inputs and textarea

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Click into a text input field | Cursor appears on the right side of the input |
| 2 | 2. Verify placeholder text alignment and direction | Placeholder is right-aligned and displays RTL direction |
| 3 | 3. Type RTL text into the input field | Text appears right-aligned and flows RTL |
| 4 | 4. Enter multi-line RTL text into a textarea | Each line is right-aligned and flows RTL |

**Final Expected Result:** Inputs and placeholders are RTL-conform with correct cursor behavior

---

### TC-1105: Form submission stores RTL input correctly

**Type:** e2e
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-124
**Requirement:** WA-LOC-001

**Description:** Ensure RTL input values are saved and displayed correctly after submission

**Preconditions:**
- RTL language is active
- User is on a form page with a submit action

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Fill in form fields with RTL text and mixed content | Fields accept input without validation errors |
| 2 | 2. Submit the form | Submission succeeds and confirmation appears |
| 3 | 3. Reopen the saved record or view confirmation details | Saved content is displayed correctly in RTL |

**Final Expected Result:** Form data is saved and displayed correctly in RTL

---

### TC-1106: Mixed RTL and LTR content rendering with numbers and URLs

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-124
**Requirement:** WA-LOC-001

**Description:** Verify embedding of LTR content within RTL text without layout breaks

**Preconditions:**
- RTL language is active
- Page contains mixed RTL/LTR content with numbers and URLs

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Open a content page with RTL text containing numbers and URLs | Content loads correctly |
| 2 | 2. Observe numbers embedded within RTL sentences | Numbers appear in correct order and remain readable |
| 3 | 3. Observe URLs or LTR terms embedded in RTL text | URLs/LTR terms remain left-to-right and do not break layout |

**Final Expected Result:** Mixed RTL/LTR content is readable and layout remains intact

---

### TC-1107: Boundary: Long RTL text wrapping in containers

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-124
**Requirement:** WA-LOC-001

**Description:** Verify layout integrity and wrapping with long RTL strings

**Preconditions:**
- RTL language is active
- A page has containers with fixed widths (cards, table cells)

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Input or load a very long RTL text string in a fixed-width container | Text is displayed within the container |
| 2 | 2. Observe text wrapping and overflow behavior | Text wraps RTL correctly or is truncated as designed without breaking layout |

**Final Expected Result:** Long RTL text is handled gracefully within constrained layouts

---

### TC-1108: Negative: RTL settings not applied to a specific component

**Type:** integration
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-124
**Requirement:** WA-LOC-001

**Description:** Detect component-specific RTL misalignment regression

**Preconditions:**
- RTL language is active
- A page contains a third-party widget or embedded component

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Open the page containing the embedded component | Component loads and is visible |
| 2 | 2. Inspect the component's alignment and direction | Component content follows RTL like the rest of the page |

**Final Expected Result:** All components, including embedded ones, respect RTL settings

---

### TC-1109: Boundary: Pagination at first and last page in RTL

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-124
**Requirement:** WA-LOC-001

**Description:** Validate RTL pagination control placement and disabled state

**Preconditions:**
- RTL language is active
- List view contains multiple pages

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Navigate to the first page of a list | Previous control (RTL position) is disabled |
| 2 | 2. Navigate to the last page of the list | Next control (RTL position) is disabled |

**Final Expected Result:** Pagination controls are positioned RTL and disabled appropriately at boundaries

---

### TC-111: Delete already deleted message

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-013
**Requirement:** WA-MSG-003

**Description:** Verify the system informs the user when attempting to delete a message that no longer exists

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- A message was deleted from the inbox

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Attempt to delete the same previously deleted message (via UI action or direct link) | System processes the request |
| 2 | 2. Observe system response | An error or informational message indicates the message no longer exists |

**Final Expected Result:** System informs the user that the message has already been deleted or does not exist

---

### TC-1110: Negative: Incorrect cursor position in RTL input after LTR insertion

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** low
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-124
**Requirement:** WA-LOC-001

**Description:** Ensure cursor remains RTL-conform when LTR text is inserted

**Preconditions:**
- RTL language is active
- Input field supports mixed content

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Click into a text input and type RTL text | Cursor is at the right and text flows RTL |
| 2 | 2. Insert LTR text (e.g., an English word or URL) in the middle | Cursor behavior remains logical and text remains readable without reversal |

**Final Expected Result:** Cursor and text direction handle mixed RTL/LTR input correctly

---

### TC-1111: Performance: RTL page load and rendering time

**Type:** performance
**Priority:** low
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-124
**Requirement:** WA-LOC-001

**Description:** Ensure RTL rendering does not degrade performance beyond acceptable limits

**Preconditions:**
- RTL language is active
- Performance monitoring is enabled

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Open a complex page with text, navigation, forms, and lists in RTL | Page loads successfully |
| 2 | 2. Measure initial render time and layout stabilization | Render time is within defined performance thresholds |

**Final Expected Result:** RTL pages render within acceptable performance thresholds

### TC-1112: Display de-DE formatted date, number, and currency

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-125
**Requirement:** WA-LOC-002

**Description:** Verify system displays date, number, and currency in de-DE format

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- User locale is set to de-DE
- A record exists with date=2024-12-31, number=1234.56, currency=EUR 1234.56

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Navigate to the record details page | Record details are displayed |
| 2 | 2. View the date field | Date is displayed as 31.12.2024 |
| 3 | 3. View the number field | Number is displayed as 1.234,56 |
| 4 | 4. View the currency field | Currency is displayed as 1.234,56 € |

**Final Expected Result:** All values are shown in de-DE regional format

---

### TC-1113: Accept en-US date and number input and store correctly

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-125
**Requirement:** WA-LOC-002

**Description:** Verify en-US input is accepted and stored as correct values

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- User locale is set to en-US
- User has access to create/edit a record

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Open the create/edit form | Form fields are displayed |
| 2 | 2. Enter date as 12/31/2024 | Date input is accepted |
| 3 | 3. Enter number as 1,234.56 | Number input is accepted |
| 4 | 4. Submit the form | Form submits successfully |
| 5 | 5. Reopen the saved record | Record displays saved values |

**Final Expected Result:** Stored values correspond to date=2024-12-31 and number=1234.56

---

### TC-1114: Validate error for mismatched locale input in de-DE

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-125
**Requirement:** WA-LOC-002

**Description:** Verify validation error when input does not match active locale format (de-DE)

- User is logged in
- User locale is set to de-DE
- User has access to create/edit a record

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Open the create/edit form | Form fields are displayed |
| 2 | 2. Enter date as 12/31/2024 | Date input is entered |
| 3 | 3. Enter number as 1,234.56 | Number input is entered |
| 4 | 4. Submit the form | Validation errors are shown |

**Final Expected Result:** System shows validation errors indicating required de-DE formats (TT.MM.JJJJ and 1.234,56)

### TC-1116: Boundary: de-DE number formatting with zero and large value

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-125
**Requirement:** WA-LOC-002

**Description:** Verify de-DE formatting for boundary number values

- User locale is set to de-DE
- A record exists with number=0 and number=1000000.01

|---|--------|------------------|

| 3 | 3. Navigate to the record details page for number=1000000.01 | Record details are displayed |
| 4 | 4. View the number field for 1000000.01 | Number is displayed as 1.000.000,01 |

**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-125
**Requirement:** WA-LOC-002

|---|--------|------------------|

### TC-112: Delete the only message in inbox

**Type:** functional
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-013
**Requirement:** WA-MSG-003

**Description:** Verify deletion when the inbox contains exactly one message (boundary condition)

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- Inbox contains exactly one message

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Navigate to the inbox | Inbox shows exactly one message |
| 2 | 2. Select the only message | Message is highlighted or marked as selected |
| 3 | 3. Click the delete option | Delete action completes successfully |
| 4 | 4. Refresh or revisit the inbox list | Inbox is empty and shows an empty state message |

**Final Expected Result:** The inbox becomes empty and displays an empty state

### TC-1120: Integration: Locale switch updates display formats

**Type:** integration
**Priority:** medium
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-125
**Requirement:** WA-LOC-002

**Description:** Verify switching locale updates displayed formats without data change

**Preconditions:**
- User is logged in
- A record exists with date=2024-12-31, number=1234.56, currency=EUR 1234.56

**Steps:**

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Set user locale to en-US | Locale is updated to en-US |
| 2 | 2. Open the record details page | Values are displayed in en-US formats |
| 3 | 3. Switch locale to de-DE | Locale is updated to de-DE |
| 4 | 4. Refresh or reopen the record details page | Values are displayed in de-DE formats |

**Final Expected Result:** Display format changes with locale; underlying values remain unchanged

### TC-1121: E2E: Create record in en-US and view in de-DE

**Priority:** high
**Status:** manual
**User Story:** US-125
**Requirement:** WA-LOC-002

- User has access to create/edit records

| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|------------------|
| 1 | 1. Set user locale to en-US | Locale is updated to en-US |
| 2 | 2. Create a record with date 12/31/2024 and number 1,234.56 | Record is created successfully |
| 3 | 3. Switch user locale to de-DE | Locale is updated to de-DE |
| 4 | 4. Open the created record | Record values are displayed in de-DE format |

**Final Expected Result:** Stored data is consistent and displayed according to active locale
